gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor steps closer to the colorful objects, spreading arms wide to showcase both groups while smiling
a person leans slightly forward, tilts their head inquisitively, and gestures toward the groups as if inviting ideas
a tutor moves one hand toward the two groups, then brings both hands together in front of their chest to illustrate combining
a person raises one hand to their chin, then gestures toward each group with the other hand while counting softly
a tutor stands tall, spreads arms wide, and begins counting while moving one hand in front of them to guide the count
a person shifts slightly from side to side, raising both hands and counting aloud as if encouraging the learners to join
a tutor claps hands together cheerfully, then points confidently to the imaginary total while smiling at the learners
a person places a hand over their heart, then gestures outward with the other hand, encouraging understanding of addition
